definition:
A man of the Kingdom of Israel, living at the time of Divided Monarchy, first mentioned at 2Ki.15.10; 
 father of: Shallum (H7967)
 § Jabesh = "dry"
1) a town in the territory of Gilead; according to Eusebius, it is beyond the Jordan, 6 miles (10 km) from Pella, on the mountain road to Gerasa
 may be modern 'Wadi Yabes'
2) father of Shallum, the 15th king of the northern kingdom
